headline: Jim Cramer Highlights the Strong Institutional Support for Welltower Stock
summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he advised investors to stick with the largest tech companies in the market. Cramer praised the company’s chart, as he commented: Why don’t we start with the weekly chart of the biggest one, the one everybody knows if you’re following this industry, […]
